title: Playground
description: A modpack with all utility mods for the Playground server
body:
# Playground Utility Pack
*⚠️ Designed to be used on playground.redstone.llc, support on other servers is not guaranteed at all*

This modpack enhances your playground experience with a curated collection of mods that boost performance, help you create content, and improve communication.

- **PTSL:** Mod to import functions / actions more easily into Playground.
- **Axiom:** Helps you with building faster and adds a way to import Schematics.
- **Simple Voice Chat:** Seamless in-game communication.

**There are many more mods included** to deliver additional performance improvements, configuration enhancements, and QOL features.
